title: ProCut S 600 Tile Cutter - Tile Cutters for Ceramic Tiles - 600mm Cutting Length - Precise Tiles Cutter Thanks to Tungsten Carbide with Ball Bearing with Magnetic Breaking Punch
features: PERFECT FOR HOME WORKERS - the BOLKERS ProCut S 600 tile cutter is a real all-rounder and supports you in your tile project. Ideal for removal or renovation work
EXTREMELY PRECISE CUTS - thanks to the tungsten carbide cutting wheel with ball bearings, even narrow strips can be easily cut. Thanks to the magnetic breaking stamp, the tile can be broken cleanly
EXCELLENT LEAD - the die-cast aluminium handle can be wonderfully guided thanks to a length of 36.5 cm and allows you to easily score your tiles and break exactly to measure
ADJUSTABLE BOOM - the angle-adjustable guide allows you to oblique and diagonal cuts from 0-60°. The side arms (180°) ensure widening of the base plate - for larger tile formats
SUITABLE TILE TYPES - whether ceramic tiles, glass tiles or granite tiles: the high-quality tile cutter from BOLKERS is the right choice when it comes to tiles up to 12 mm thick
breadCrumbs: DIY & Tools > Power, Garden & Hand Tools > Hand Tools > Cutters > Tile Cutters
